executive_strategic_insight.core_theme: Limited public signal this quarter — Panther's blog is JS-rendered with minimal crawlable content, suggesting either reduced public comms or a website rebuild in progress
executive_strategic_insight.strategic_focus: Based on available data, Panther continues positioning as a modern cloud-native SIEM alternative with detection-as-code using Python. Their Framer-based website rebuild suggests investment in marketing/brand refresh. Prior positioning around serverless architecture and cost transparency likely maintained.
executive_strategic_insight.ecosystem_momentum: Insufficient data from current scrape — website uses heavy JavaScript rendering that limits static content extraction. Prior quarter showed focus on CrowdStrike, SentinelOne, and Okta integrations.
executive_strategic_insight.persona_shift: Likely still targeting detection engineers and security operations teams in cloud-native organizations.
executive_strategic_insight.pricing_model_shift: Insufficient data — prior positioning was usage-based (per GB ingested) with committed use discounts.

engineering_capacity.velocity_assessment: Unable to assess — JS-rendered changelog returned 404, blog content not extractable from static scrape

key_items: Google Tag Manager + Hotjar analytics implementation
Estimated: continued Python detection SDK development
Estimated: log ingestion and normalization improvements
Estimated: continued security tool data source expansion

intelligence_signals.job_board_signals: Insufficient data from public scrape this month.
intelligence_signals.target_users: Detection engineers, security operations teams, cloud-native security architects
intelligence_signals.monetization_approach: Enterprise SaaS with usage-based component. Likely continuing large deal focus ($200K+ ARR).

gaps_exposed: Securin has no SIEM/detection capability (unchanged from prior assessment)
No log ingestion or correlation features
areas_of_focus: SIEM remains outside Securin's core — partnership strategy more appropriate than build
Ensure Securin data exports are SIEM-compatible for customers using Panther-like platforms

product_specific.APT: Panther's detection engine remains complementary — could compete with APT only if they add threat intelligence analysis layers.
product_specific.CSPM: Cloud log analysis has some overlap with CSPM cloud monitoring.
